prose: **Benzene HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fitted RKS) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point calculation on supplied `.xyz` structure (C₆H₆, 12 atoms); coordinates not relaxed at this level. SCF converged in 8 cycles. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.6310857 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). HOMO energy = −7.0468329 eV; LUMO energy = −0.41574728 eV. Integrity status: OK and trustworthy. Command: `frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard <benzene.xyz>`.
